LAW AND MOTION 302,1 - RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION. RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS' UNOPPOSED DEMURRER TO AMENDED PETITION. THE COURT VACATES THE TENTATIVE RULING ON BOTH DEMURRERS AND SIGNS THE STIPULATION AND ORDER ALLOWING PETITIONER TO FILE A SECOND AMENDED PETITIOTION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTARTIVE MANDAMUS. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION
Off Calendar Oct-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tracy Henderson, Esq. 831-917-1583 for Petitioner. (via zoom)
Isaac Nicholson, Esq. 510-286-3800 for Respondent Dept. of Industrial Relation.
Hutchinson Meltzer, Esq. Deputy Attorney General 213-269-6240 Respondent California Apprenticeship Council (zoom)
Alexander Nicholson, Esq. 415-986-5900 Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani for Respondent SF Joint ATC.(zoom)

ARGUED. The Court admonishes parties and instruct them to read and certify the SF local rules. The Court hears from each counsel regarding the stipulation and filing of a second amended petition for writ of administrative mandamus and withdrawal of the demurrers. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS DEMURRER to Amended PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE/ PROHIBITION/ CERTIFICATION.

Respondent Department of Industrial Relations' unopposed Demurrer to Amended Petition.

The court vacates the tentative ruling on both demurrers and signs the stipulation and order allowing petitioner to file a second amended petitiotion for writ of administartive mandamus. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Oct-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Tracy Henderson, Esq. 831-917-1583 for Petitioner. (via zoom)
Isaac Nicholson, Esq. 510-286-3800 for Respondent Dept. of Industrial Relation.
Hutchinson Meltzer, Esq. Deputy Attorney General 213-269-6240 Respondent California Apprenticeship Council (zoom)
Alexander Nicholson, Esq. 415-986-5900 Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani for Respondent SF Joint ATC.(zoom)

ARGUED. The Court admonishes parties and instruct them to read and certify the SF local rules. The Court hears from each counsel regarding the stipulation and filing of a second amended petition for writ of administrative mandamus and withdrawal of the demurrers. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2 - RESPONDENT SAN FRANCISCO JOINT APPRENTICE & TRAINING COMMITTEE DEMURRER.

Respondent San Francisco Joint Apprentice & Training Committee's unopposed Demurrer to Amended Petition.

The court vacates the tentative ruling on both demurrers and signs the stipulation and order allowing petitioner to file a second amended petitiotion for writ of administartive mandamus. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
